en: Adults: 4-6 tablets of (Spiramycin750,000 IU + Metronidazole e 125
mg), or 2-3 tablets of (Spiramycin1,5 MIU + Metronidazole e 250 mg)
may be increase to 8 tablets of (Spiramycin750,000 IU + Metronidazole
e 125 mg) or 4 tablets of (Spiramycin1,5 MIU + Metronidazole e 250 mg).
Packing: 2 Blisters, each contains 10 film-coated tablets/box.
